description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:git image with the docker:dind service. Define a before_script that installs ssh-agent and rsync via apk if missing, starts ssh-agent, creates a ~/.ssh directory with mode 700, writes the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY to ~/.ssh/id_rsa with mode 600, and adds somatorio.org to known_hosts. Add a single job named deploy slides in the deploy stage that runs rsync -az * $SSH_USERHOST:$RSYNC_DESTINO to copy the repository contents to the remote host. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules, so the job runs on every pipeline execution.
